top_tweets.text: Everyone complains about minimalist design until the company tries something fun and everyone reveals why all the companies have been forced into minimalist design
top_tweets.author: AndyMasley
top_tweets.name: Andy Masley
top_tweets.summary_zh: 所有人抱怨極簡設計，但當公司嘗試有趣設計時，大家的反應反而揭示了為何企業被迫走向極簡風格。這道出設計決策背後的市場與用戶接受度矛盾。

top_tweets.text:
UI peaked here, unironically.

Everything was so easy to read, even on low resolution monitors. Sure, it wasn't stable enough, and the search function (before they ruined it) is nice to have, but they really just focused on usability with the graphic design of Win2000. https://t.co/Co4Fzty9S7
top_tweets.author: CryptoCyberia
top_tweets.name: Lain on the Blockchain
top_tweets.summary_zh: 認為 Windows 2000 的 UI 設計達到巔峰，即使在低解析度螢幕上也極易閱讀，圖形設計完全聚焦於可用性。反映出對當代過度簡化 UI 的反思。

top_tweets.text:
UI/UX Designers, If you're new to design animation, this post is for you. 

Here are 12 essential principles of UI/UX animation that you should know when animating your next UI design project.

Bookmark it for later 💜 https://t.co/P4cNuMMqiJ
top_tweets.author: Abmankendrick
top_tweets.name: Abraham John 🦄🦓
top_tweets.summary_zh: 整理了 12 個 UI/UX 動畫的核心原則，適合剛開始學習設計動畫的設計師在專案中應用。

top_tweets.text: I worked with Glitch to help design all the merch. I even drew the Animiniz with the help of my team. The Gobbles plushie looks like he was stung by a bee.. But when you get one I promise if you crush his skull from the sides he becomes on model.
top_tweets.author: RubberNinja
top_tweets.name: RubberRoss
top_tweets.summary_zh: 分享與 Glitch 合作設計周邊商品的經驗，包含角色設計與實體玩偶製作細節，展現從數位到實體產品的設計轉化過程。

top_tweets.text:
xAI got some seriously best designers now

The design quality has really leveled up and it’s pretty sick https://t.co/S3xVs3rnGY
top_tweets.author: XFreeze
top_tweets.name: X Freeze
top_tweets.summary_zh: xAI 的設計品質明顯提升，團隊現在擁有頂尖設計師，整體設計水準大幅躍進。

top_tweets.text:
Kimi K2.6 is actually a beast for design.

❤️‍🔥 Just recorded a tutorial on how to use Kimi K2.6 + to build award-winning $10k websites (step-by-step). https://t.co/YDXDnwK4XX
top_tweets.author: viktoroddy
top_tweets.name: Viktor Oddy
top_tweets.summary_zh: Kimi K2.6 在設計應用上表現強大，作者錄製了如何用它打造高品質網站的完整教學。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Kirki
top_products.author: Kawshar Ahmed
top_products.tagline: WordPress finally has a freeform canvas website builder.
top_products.summary_zh: 一個為 WordPress 設計的自由版面網站建構工具，讓使用者能以更靈活的方式編輯網站版面配置。

top_products.title: Raybeam
top_products.author: Nathan
top_products.tagline: A better way to screen share on macOS
top_products.summary_zh: 專為 macOS 設計的螢幕分享工具，提供更優化的畫面共享體驗。
